text:
# April 19, 2026  
Sunday. The entire day was spent with family. It felt nice to take a break from the office routine.  
Morning: went to the local market with Preeti. Got fresh vegetables and some clothes for the kids. Indore markets are always bustling. Neetish wanted a new backpack for school. Mohan asked for a toy car.  
Evening: took the family to PCSO (the mall near Sarafa Bazaar). The kids enjoyed the rides. Preeti bought some jewelry. We had chaat at Sarah's. The kids love the poha and jalebi there.  
Browny stayed at home with my mother-in-law. She fed him extra treats when we returned. He's going to be even harder to put on a diet now.  
Evening was relaxed. Preeti and I sat on the balcony talking about future plans. Maybe a trip to Bangalore during the holidays. The kids would love it.  
Bedtime was late since it's Sunday tomorrow. The kids stayed up a bit later watching cartoons.
